event.summary: Recorded passing validation; acceptance remains a separate explicit transition.

acceptance.proof: Encoding and parsing admit only canonical u64 decimal, exact CRLF, and one unchanged LSLC-002A body under explicit nonzero body and complete-envelope limits.

Tests cover zero and u64 maximum, leading zeros, nondigits, overflow, LF-only, mixed, missing and extra delimiters, truncation, complete-envelope oversize, and invalid document bodies with stable offsets.
Envelope parsing returns LSLC-002A shape state only; LSLC-002B typed admission remains a separate explicit caller action and no correlation or currentness meaning is inferred.
No sockets, discovery runtime, endpoint ownership, retries, clocks, providers, interoperability, dependencies, features, unsafe, devices, activation, or Manifold authority are added.

document.commit_policy: Commit the inert response-envelope contract separately from networking, correlation semantics, runtime activation, and authority.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route LSLC-002F exact envelope ownership and non-scope.
Describe only the bounded inert response-envelope contract.
Reviewed public/private routing; no shared-skill mutation required.
Reviewed artifact separation, bounded rejection, and authority closure; no shared-skill mutation required.

non_scope: Query-response correlation semantics, sockets, UDP, multicast, discovery runtime, endpoint ownership or selection, retries, clocks, provider or currentness evidence, or ecosystem interoperability.
Dependencies, features, unsafe, FFI, devices, runtime activation, private observation artifacts, copied implementation source, or external oracle execution.
Manifold admission, registry, subscription, route, lease, session, topology, revision, replay, authorization, audit, transport, command, product, or provider authority.
document.objective: Implement the smallest dependency-free source-only LSLC-002F response-envelope contract over one uninterpreted canonical u64 decimal query identifier, exact CRLF, and one unchanged LSLC-002A-shaped body, while keeping LSLC-002B semantic admission separate.
outputs: Borrowed bounded parser with stable complete-envelope first-failure offsets.
Owned bounded encoder using checked sizing and one exact fallible reserve.
Valid and damaged tests, focused gate, public routing, Standard receipt, and no-force executed feature-push receipt.
